title: Campaign & Sector Progression

steps: For each sector: registerSerpuloSector(id, author, mapFileLink, captureWave, difficulty)
Special named presets created inline: fallenVessel(difficulty=9), geothermalStronghold(difficulty=10), cruxscape(difficulty=10)
Mega-base sectors: shieldSectors added to sector 27 (requires sectors 246,244,242 captured)
sector.isShielded()    → preset.shieldSectors.size>0 && any shieldSector not isCaptured()
For each planet's sector where hasBase():
if !isBeingPlayed(): add production stats to items (capped at storageCapacity), sector.saveInfo()
if isBeingPlayed(): set state.rules.winWave, waves=true, attackMode=false
else: set sector.info.winWave, waves=true, attack=false, saveInfo()
[TRIGGER] Player reaches captureWave OR destroys all enemy cores in attackMode

activity_flows.flow: E. TechTree Unlock via SectorComplete Objective
steps: TechNode created: new TechNode(parent, content, requirements)
→ if context is SectorPreset: auto-insert SectorComplete(preset) at objectives[0]
For each TechNode: check all objectives.complete()
[DECISION] All objectives met AND item requirements fulfilled:
GameService listens: researchRouter, researchLogic, researchAll achievements

activity_flows.flow: F. Sector Loss & Re-entry with Damage Simulation
steps: [TRIGGER] All player cores destroyed → gameOver fired
Player selects lost sector to re-land → Control.playSector(origin, sector)
restore old derelicts from previous save
copy previous player buildings as derelict team tiles
Find all waveTeam CoreBlocks + spawn overlay tiles → add to frontier
[DECISION] player core != null && frontier not empty:
A* pathfind(spawner → player core.tile) using cost(tile)
else: sum health of buildings in radius-3 circle along path
Phase 2 — BFS damage propagation (only if fraction > 0.15):
if resultDamage > 0: add to frontier, update values[cx][cy]

key_conditions: captureWave > 0 → wave-survival win condition; else → attack mode (destroy enemy cores)
fraction >= 1.0 → destroy all buildings along path + all player cores
fraction > 0.15 → enable BFS damage propagation phase
minutesCaptured > invasionGracePeriod + hasSpawns → eligible for random invasion
shieldSectors all captured → sector becomes landable
isLastSector = true → triggers planet completion achievement (completeSerpulo / completeErekir)
key_relationships: SectorSubmissions creates SectorPreset and links to Sector via planet.sectors.get(id)
SectorPreset owns Sector (1:1 preset per sector)
Sector owns SectorInfo (runtime state: waves, attack, hasCore, production, items)
Universe.runTurn() iterates all planet sectors, fires TurnEvent and SectorInvasionEvent
Logic.sectorCapture() fires SectorCaptureEvent → Logic/Universe/GameService all listen
Control.playSector() triggers SectorDamage.apply() on lost-sector re-entry
TechNode.objectives includes SectorComplete(preset) auto-inserted when parent is SectorPreset
GameService listens to SectorCaptureEvent, ResearchEvent, WaveEvent, TurnEvent for achievements/stats
important_notes: SectorSubmissions only manages community-submitted Discord map links for hidden sectors on Serpulo; does not control game logic
generateEnemyBase=true is set when captureWave<=0, meaning victory requires destroying all enemy cores (attack mode)
SectorDamage.apply(fraction): fraction=1.0 used when re-entering a fully lost sector; path removal targets buildings proportional to fraction of total path health
Universe.runTurn() auto-invades sectors after invasionGracePeriod minutes if nearby enemy bases exist
TechNode auto-inserts SectorComplete objective when parent TechNode's content is a SectorPreset
SectorInfo.waves=true / attack=true tracks offline sector attack state; isCaptured() checks both
Sector.isFrozen() = under attack but not currently being played → time-frozen, no production updates
